examples: Unsurprisingly, the Kikuyu view is different.
But what they wanted was a Kikuyu to kill-any Kikuyu.
Some 97% of Kikuyu voted for Mr Kibaki. Everywhere else he was trounced.
Kenya's first post-independence leader, Jomo Kenyatta, president from 1964 until 1978, was a Kikuyu.
Nairobi was on the Maasai plains, at the point where the plains joined the Kikuyu highlands.
